overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring the protagonist Aloy. The clip begins with a cinematic third-person view of the character walking along snow-covered mountain cliffs during a vibrant sunset, transitions through rocky mountain valleys, and cuts to a dense forest with dramatic god rays filtering through tall trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain cliff overlooking ocean at sunset

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along snow-covered cliff edge with ocean view to the right

entered.detail: large gray rock formation with snow patches rising vertically
vast ocean visible beyond the cliff edge reflecting orange sunset
narrow snow-covered path along the cliff edge
bright orange sun near horizon casting warm light across the scene

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide-open snowy cliff ledge during a vibrant sunset. The ocean stretches out to the right while a massive rocky cliff wall rises on the left. The sun casts warm orange and pink light across the snow-covered ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain valley with red illuminated rock faces

events.description: moves from open cliff into narrower mountain valley with red illuminated rock faces ahead

agents.ego_description: character ascending a snowy mountain path between rock walls, moving toward red-lit cliffs

entered.detail: tall rock face glowing red from the setting sun's light
constricted path between rock walls with snow on the ground

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrower mountain valley enclosed by rock walls. The character ascends a snowy path toward striking red-illuminated rock faces glowing in the sunset light. The ocean view disappears as the path winds deeper into the mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain ridge with bonfire overlooking forested valley

events.description: emerges from narrow valley onto open ridge with expansive view of forested valley below
approaches and passes a large bonfire with smoke rising into the sky
sun sets below horizon causing scene to darken significantly into twilight

agents.ego_description: character walking along mountain ridge, passing a bonfire as the sunset fades to darkness

entered.detail: dense forest visible in the valley below the ridge
large campfire with dark smoke rising, situated on the snow
snow-capped peaks visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open snow-covered ridge with a panoramic view of a forested valley below. A large bonfire burns on the path, emitting dark smoke. As the character continues walking, the sun sets completely and the sky darkens into twilight.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense coniferous forest with god rays filtering through canopy

events.description: hard cut transition from snowy mountain to completely different location in dense forest
dramatic god rays become visible filtering through tall trees creating ethereal atmosphere

agents.ego_description: character walking through dense forest, exploring the path surrounded by towering trees and misty light

entered.detail: massive towering evergreen trees with thick trunks
massive towering evergreen trees with thick trunks
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with moss and vegetation
beams of sunlight filtering through the tree canopy creating dramatic lighting
large decaying tree trunk lying across the forest floor

segments.scene_description: After a fade to black, the scene cuts to a dense coniferous forest with towering pine trees. Dramatic god rays filter through the canopy, illuminating misty air. The character walks along a narrow forest path surrounded by lush vegetation and massive tree trunks, exploring the serene woodland environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the open, sun-drenched heights of a snowy coastline into the deep, misty shadows of a coniferous forest. It begins with the character walking along a wide snowy cliff ledge under a vibrant sunset, with the ocean stretching to the right and a massive rock wall to the left. As the path winds deeper into the mountains, the ocean view vanishes and the scene shifts into a narrow valley where the rock faces glow with striking red illumination. The camera then emerges onto an open ridge featuring a smoking bonfire and a panoramic view of a forested valley, while the warm sunset light fades into the dark tones of twilight. Finally, the environment transforms into a dense woodland of towering pine trees, where dramatic god rays filter through the canopy to illuminate a misty, lush forest path.
